_meta: Quest database. Each quest: name, giver, summary, ordered stages[{id,text}] (text = the current objective shown in the Journal), optional reward{money,item,skill,class}. Quest progress lives in GameSave.state.quests = { <id>: {status:'active'|'done'|'failed', stage:<index>} }. Driven by the `quest` event command (start/advance/complete/fail/stage) and read by `conditional` kind 'quest'. Rewards apply on complete. Engine-agnostic DATA.

awakening.name: The Awakening
awakening.summary: You have Awakened in Dawnhearth. The System is eager to help. Learn what it wants of you.

stages.text: Interface with the System crystal in the plaza.
Clear the creature troubling the edge of town.
